Oracle.ImportQuery: SELECT TO_CHAR(c.CUST_SID) AS CUST_SID, TRIM(ca.PHONE1) AS PHONE1, TRIM(ca.PHONE2) AS PHONE2 FROM CMS.CUSTOMER c INNER JOIN CMS.CUST_ADDRESS ca ON ca.CUST_SID = c.CUST_SID WHERE NVL(c.ACTIVE, 1) = 1 AND NVL(c.ALLOW_PHONE, 0) = 1 AND NVL(ca.ACTIVE, 1) = 1 AND NVL(ca.INCLUDE_PHONE, 0) = 1 AND (ca.PHONE1 IS NOT NULL OR ca.PHONE2 IS NOT NULL)
